meta._test_notes: This is a FICTIONAL test file. Person: Alex Morgan. Used to validate edge cases across all 4 profiles.

de.title: Data Engineer
de.tagline: Architecting high-throughput data pipelines, lakehouses & real-time orchestration systems at enterprise scale
de.summary: Senior Data Engineer with 4 years of hands-on experience designing and operating production-grade data infrastructure across cloud platforms. Specialises in building fault-tolerant ETL/ELT pipelines, automated SLA monitoring frameworks, and scalable data lakehouses on Databricks and Azure. Delivered mission-critical data solutions for clients in pharmaceutical, retail, and financial services sectors. Holds Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional certification and a strong track record of reducing pipeline costs by 40% through compute optimisation and incremental load strategies.

swe.title: Software Engineer / Full Stack Developer
swe.tagline: Building secure, production-ready full-stack applications, REST APIs & scalable backend systems
swe.summary: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4 years of production experience delivering enterprise-grade web applications, microservices, and REST APIs for global clients. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, React, Node.js, MySQL, and PostgreSQL. Experienced in containerisation with Docker, CI/CD automation via GitLab, and building secure role-based authentication systems. Known for writing clean, well-documented, modular code that reduces onboarding time and accelerates team delivery velocity.

ds.title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
ds.tagline: Turning complex, high-dimensional datasets into validated predictive models and executive-level business insights
ds.summary: Results-driven Data Scientist and ML Engineer with 4 years of experience building and deploying predictive models, conducting advanced statistical analysis, and delivering interactive BI dashboards for C-suite stakeholders. Proficient in XGBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, and neural network architectures. Experienced in A/B testing frameworks, feature stores, and MLflow-based model lifecycle management. Delivered models that improved forecast accuracy by 28% and reduced churn by 15% for a leading retail client.

ai.title: AI / LLM Engineer
ai.tagline: Designing production-grade LLM agents, RAG pipelines & multi-modal generative AI systems for enterprise
ai.summary: Innovative AI/LLM Engineer with 4 years of experience delivering production conversational AI systems, multi-agent orchestration pipelines, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications for Fortune 500 clients. Proficient in OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Phi-3-mini SLM, LangGraph, CrewAI, ChromaDB, and pgvector. Deep expertise in prompt engineering, LLM fine-tuning, and agentic workflow design. Built AI systems serving over 10,000 daily active users with sub-300ms response latency.

experience.company: Nexus Analytics & Cloud Solutions Private Limited
bullets_de: Architected and deployed a fully automated multi-brand data pipeline orchestration system on Databricks for a Fortune 500 pharmaceutical client, eliminating 100% dependency on paid orchestration tools and reducing infrastructure costs by 38%.

Designed dynamic incremental load frameworks using Delta Lake and PySpark, processing only changed records instead of full historical loads and cutting average pipeline execution time from 4 hours to 45 minutes.

Built a real-time SLA monitoring system categorising 200+ daily pipeline runs as On-Time, Delayed, or Missed SLA with automated SMTP alerts and Confluence-based incident dashboards, reducing mean time to resolution by 60%.
Engineered a parameterised Apache Airflow DAG framework supporting configurable scheduling across 14 brands and 6 time zones, enabling zero-code onboarding for new business units.
Optimised 37 critical Spark SQL queries through partition pruning, broadcast joins, and adaptive query execution, achieving a 52% reduction in cluster compute costs on Azure Databricks.
Implemented idempotent pipeline logic with checkpoint-based recovery, preventing duplicate data ingestion across 8 business unit delta tables across 3 production environments.
Led end-to-end data validation using 150+ business rules, ensuring 99.97% data accuracy across all pipeline outputs and reducing downstream reporting defects by 80%.
Prepared comprehensive technical documentation on Confluence including architecture diagrams, runbooks, and data flow maps; conducted 5 knowledge transfer sessions enabling seamless handover.
bullets_swe: Designed and developed a secure, multi-tenant REST API platform using FastAPI and Python, serving 12 internal teams with role-based access control, JWT authentication, and rate limiting.

Built a full-stack employee feedback and HR management portal using React, FastAPI, MySQL, and Docker — delivering role-based dashboards, real-time RAG status visualisation, and automated SMTP email workflows.
Engineered a modular microservices architecture for a client-facing reporting platform, decomposing a 45,000-line monolith into 11 independently deployable services with documented OpenAPI contracts.
Implemented GitLab CI/CD pipelines with automated unit testing, linting, Docker image builds, and zero-downtime blue-green deployments, reducing release cycle time from 2 weeks to 3 days.
Built secure password encryption using hashlib with salt-based hashing, bcrypt fallback, and automated credential rotation policies for 3 internal enterprise applications.
Containerised 8 production applications using Docker Compose and Kubernetes, enabling consistent deployment across development, staging, and production environments with 99.9% uptime.
Developed comprehensive automated test suites covering unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using pytest and Selenium, achieving 87% code coverage and eliminating 95% of regression defects.
Maintained detailed API documentation, developer wikis, and onboarding guides reducing new developer ramp-up time from 3 weeks to 5 days.
bullets_ds: Led the end-to-end development of an XGBoost-based pharmaceutical sales forecasting model, achieving 91.3% accuracy on held-out test data and enabling $2.4M in optimised inventory decisions for the client.
Engineered a 340-feature dataset through domain-driven feature engineering, recursive feature elimination, and interaction term creation, improving model F1 score by 18% over the baseline.

Built dynamic Power BI and Tableau dashboards consuming live pipeline data, enabling C-suite stakeholders to monitor sales trends, prescriber behaviour, and regional KPIs with drill-down to SKU level.

Designed and executed a rigorous A/B testing framework for marketing campaign optimisation, analysing 500,000 user sessions and delivering statistically significant recommendations that increased conversion by 12%.
Applied advanced EDA techniques including correlation matrices, PCA decomposition, and SHAP value analysis to uncover non-obvious patterns in 15 pharmaceutical datasets totalling 80GB.
Implemented MLflow experiment tracking, model versioning, and automated retraining pipelines, reducing model deployment time from 3 weeks to 2 days and ensuring full reproducibility.

Developed a Streamlit-based interactive ML prediction application enabling business analysts to generate real-time forecasts without SQL or Python knowledge, used by 45 non-technical stakeholders daily.
Delivered monthly model performance reports to executive stakeholders, translating technical metrics into business impact narratives with clear ROI quantification.
bullets_ai: Designed and deployed a production-grade multi-agent RAG system for pharmaceutical regulatory document queries, using LangGraph orchestration, ChromaDB vector store, and OpenAI GPT-4o, serving 800 daily queries with 94% user satisfaction.

Engineered a 3-agent LLM pipeline for automated SQL query optimisation (QuerySense) using AutoGen, CrewAI, and LangChain, reducing manual query tuning time by 70% and improving query performance by 52% on average.

Built the CTDA Clinical Trial Operations Assistant using Phi-3-mini SLM with RAG over ClinicalTrials.gov data, integrating pgvector for semantic search and achieving sub-300ms average response latency at 95th percentile.

Developed and maintained a prompt engineering framework with structured chain-of-thought templates, few-shot examples, and output validation schemas, improving LLM response accuracy by 34% across 6 production applications.

Fine-tuned a domain-specific instruction model on 12,000 annotated pharmaceutical Q&A pairs using LoRA adapters, achieving 89% exact-match accuracy on held-out evaluation versus 61% for the base model.
Containerised all AI applications using Docker with GPU-aware resource allocation, enabling consistent deployment across cloud and on-premise environments with automated health checks.
Integrated voice-to-text input (Whisper API) and text-to-speech output into the CTDA chatbot, expanding accessibility for 200 non-technical clinical operations staff.
Established LLM evaluation pipelines using RAGAS, TruLens, and custom rubrics, enabling systematic quality assurance and regression testing for all RAG-based applications.

bullets_de: Built and maintained 25+ ETL pipelines ingesting data from REST APIs, SFTP sources, and on-premise Oracle databases into an Azure Data Lake, processing 2TB of data daily.
Migrated legacy on-premise SQL Server pipelines to Databricks, reducing operational costs by 45% and improving data freshness from daily to near-real-time (15-minute intervals).
Developed reusable PySpark transformation libraries adopted across 3 data engineering teams, reducing boilerplate code by 60% and standardising error handling patterns.
Implemented data quality checks using Great Expectations, catching 99.2% of schema violations and null anomalies before data reached downstream consumers.
bullets_swe: Developed a Python-based internal tooling platform with Flask REST APIs and a React frontend, automating 12 manual data operations workflows and saving 40 engineering hours per week.
Built and maintained MySQL and PostgreSQL database schemas for 3 client-facing applications, writing optimised stored procedures and indexed queries handling 50,000+ transactions per day.
Integrated third-party payment and notification APIs (Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid) into enterprise applications with robust error handling, retry logic, and webhook validation.
Wrote automated integration test suites using pytest-mock and factory_boy, reducing QA cycle time by 35% and enabling confident weekly release cadences.
bullets_ds: Built a customer churn prediction model using Random Forest and SMOTE oversampling, achieving 84% recall on minority class and enabling proactive retention campaigns that reduced churn by 15%.
Conducted statistical analysis on A/B test results for 8 product feature experiments, using hypothesis testing, confidence interval calculation, and effect size estimation to guide product decisions.
Created automated EDA reporting pipelines using Pandas Profiling and custom Matplotlib visualisations, reducing analyst data exploration time from 3 days to 4 hours per new dataset.
Delivered weekly data quality and model performance dashboards to product and business teams using Power BI, maintaining 100% on-time delivery over 18 months.
bullets_ai: Built an internal document Q&A chatbot using LangChain, FAISS vector store, and OpenAI GPT-3.5-turbo, reducing time spent searching internal knowledge bases by 65% for a 200-person engineering team.
Designed prompt templates and system instructions for 4 customer-facing chatbot deployments, improving first-turn resolution rate from 42% to 71% through structured few-shot prompting.

Evaluated and benchmarked 6 open-source LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Falcon, Phi-2) for on-premise deployment, producing a comprehensive cost-accuracy-latency analysis that informed architecture decisions.
Integrated OpenAI function calling into a data extraction pipeline, automating structured data extraction from 10,000+ unstructured PDF documents with 96% field-level accuracy.

projects.name: Project Alpha — Enterprise Pipeline Orchestration (DE Only Tag)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: This project is tagged DE only. It should NOT appear in SWE, DS, or AI profiles. Fully automated Databricks pipeline orchestration system replacing paid tools with custom Python scheduling logic, supporting 20+ brands across 4 regions.
highlights: This bullet is intentionally long to test text wrapping in the DOCX download — it should wrap cleanly across multiple lines without breaking words awkwardly or losing the bullet indentation alignment on the left margin of the document
Built dynamic incremental Delta Lake loads processing only changed records, cutting daily compute spend by 41%
Designed idempotent SLA alerting framework with SMTP routing to 6 stakeholder groups based on brand and region
Engineered parameterised Airflow DAGs supporting zero-code brand onboarding across 4 time zones
Prepared full Confluence runbook; delivered 3 KT sessions to operations and client teams

projects.name: Project Beta — Full Stack HR Portal (SWE Only Tag)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: This project is tagged SWE only. Should NOT appear in DE, DS, or AI profiles. Secure employee connect portal with role-based access, real-time feedback capture, RAG status tagging system, and automated email notifications.
highlights: Built secure login with role-based access control (Admin / Manager / Employee) using JWT and bcrypt password hashing
Developed real-time RAG status dashboard with filter-based reporting and CSV export for HR decision-making
Implemented automated SMTP email alerts triggered on status changes, reducing manual HR follow-up by 80%
Short bullet — tests no awkward spacing
Wrote pytest test suite achieving 83% code coverage across all API endpoints and UI workflows

projects.name: Project Gamma — Pharma Sales ML Model (DS Only Tag)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: This project is tagged DS only. Should NOT appear in DE, SWE, or AI profiles. End-to-end pharmaceutical sales forecasting system using XGBoost and Random Forest with Power BI dashboards and a Streamlit prediction interface.
highlights: Designed star schema data model with 6 dimension tables and 2 fact tables enabling sub-second analytical queries on 500M row dataset
Trained XGBoost ensemble achieving 91.3% forecast accuracy; validated using walk-forward cross-validation across 24 months of sales history
Built 14-page Power BI dashboard with drill-through from national to SKU level, used daily by 30 business analysts
Streamlit prediction app deployed internally enabling non-technical users to generate forecasts without SQL knowledge
Applied SHAP analysis to explain model decisions to regulatory compliance team, securing model approval for production use

projects.name: Project Delta — RAG Chatbot System (AI Only Tag)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: This project is tagged AI only. Should NOT appear in DE, SWE, or DS profiles. Production RAG chatbot for clinical trial regulatory document queries using Phi-3-mini SLM, pgvector, ChromaDB, and FastAPI with voice-to-text support.
highlights: Implemented Phi-3-mini SLM with retrieval-augmented generation over 50,000 clinical trial documents using ChromaDB and pgvector for semantic search
Achieved sub-300ms p95 response latency under 500 concurrent users through async FastAPI architecture and connection pooling
Integrated Whisper API voice-to-text enabling hands-free operation for clinical staff in lab environments
Built role-based UI with tab navigation and document citation display, increasing user trust scores by 34% in post-deployment survey
Established RAGAS evaluation pipeline tracking faithfulness, answer relevancy, and context precision weekly

projects.name: Project Epsilon — AI SQL Optimizer (AI + SWE + DE Tags)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: Tagged AI + SWE + DE (not DS). Should appear in AI, SWE, and DE profiles but NOT in DS profile. Multi-agent AI system that optimises SQL queries using OpenAI GPT-4o, AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph, and FastAPI with Spark SQL performance tuning on Databricks.
highlights: Designed 3-agent pipeline: Analyser agent extracts query intent, Optimiser agent rewrites SQL, Validator agent benchmarks performance — reducing manual DBA tuning time by 70%
Integrated OpenAI GPT-4o with FastAPI for real-time query enhancement with external config management and API key rotation
Built CrewAI and LangGraph orchestration layer enabling parallel agent execution and conditional workflow branching
Conducted Spark SQL benchmarking on Databricks identifying 12 critical bottlenecks; applied partition pruning and broadcast join hints achieving 52% average query speedup
Delivered clean REST API with Swagger documentation, rate limiting, and audit logging consumed by 6 downstream BI teams

projects.name: Project Zeta — GenAI Document Generator (AI + SWE Tags)
projects.description: EDGE CASE: Tagged AI + SWE only (not DE or DS). Should appear in AI and SWE profiles only. Generative AI powered full-stack application automating Statement of Work, BRD, and test case generation using Google Gemini, Streamlit, and advanced prompt engineering.
highlights: Integrated Google Gemini 1.5 Pro with structured prompt templates generating 98% approval-ready documents on first generation
Built multi-document type support (SOW, BRD, Test Cases) from a single Streamlit interface with session persistence
Implemented dotenv-based secure API key management and model parameter externalisation for environment-agnostic deployment
Reduced average document creation time from 4 hours to 12 minutes, saving the RMG team 160 hours per month
Applied chain-of-thought prompting with output validation schema ensuring consistent document structure across all generated artefacts
